
## Capacity - Senate

- Figures: `figs/[TYPE]/m-capacity-Senate-[1:2].png`

```{r m-capacity-Senate}
#| fig-show: "hold"
#| out-width: "50%"
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "Per Year"
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - "Model 1: Cross Sectional"
#|   - "Model 2: Diff in Diff"


# 1 - 
m_capacity_Senate_cross <-fenegbin (
  perYear ~ 
    #population_m + 
    chair + 
    ranking_minority + 
    subchr + 
    state_leg + 
    # prestige + 
    oversight +  
    experience | 
    # est_staff_spending  + # no data for senate 
    #majority + presidents_party | 
    Year_x_Agency, 
  cluster = "Legislator", 
  data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="Senate") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_capacity_Senate_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}
coefplot(m_capacity_Senate_cross, horiz = T, drop = ".theta") 


# 2 -
m_capacity_Senate_did <-fenegbin (
  perYear ~ 
    #population_m + 
    chair + 
    ranking_minority + 
    subchr + 
    # state_leg + 
    # prestige + 
    oversight +  
    experience | 
    # est_staff_spending  + # no data for senate 
    #majority + presidents_party | 
    Year_x_Agency + Legislator_x_Agency,
  cluster = "Legislator",
  data = data_member |> filter(chamber=="Senate") )

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_capacity_Senate_did, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_capacity_Senate_did, horiz = T, drop = ".theta")

```


### Table - population 

```{r m-capacity-Senate-models}
models_capacity <- list(
  "(1)" = m_capacity_Senate_cross,
  "(2)" = m_capacity_Senate_did
)

rows <- tibble(
  term = c("Dependent Variable"),
  `(1)` = c("Count"),
  `(2)` =c("Count")
)

# call coefs
attr(rows, 'position') <- c(0)

# HTML
modelsummary(models_capacity, 
             title = "", 
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator."))

beta_cross <- betas(m_capacity_Senate_cross)
se_cross <- standard_errors(m_capacity_Senate_cross)
beta_did <- betas(m_capacity_Senate_did)
se_did <- standard_errors(m_capacity_Senate_did)
```
